title: Kal's adventures
description: This modpack is based around cobblemon, playing with friends, exploring, and building with many mods!
body:
This modpack is based around cobblemon and foucesed around adventuring and very lightly modded.
Some mods we have in this modpack are cobblemon, beans backpacks, deeper and darker, Friends&Foes, MCA reborn, and petstore for many many pets.
